ddls:
CREATE TABLE "experiments" (
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experiment */,
  "experiment_name" TEXT /* Name of the experiment */,
  "research_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the research team conducting the experiment */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date the experiment started */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date the experiment ended */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the experiment */,
  "experiment_type" TEXT /* Type of experiment (e.g., conjugation, transformation) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the experiment (e.g., planned, in progress, completed) */,
  "funding_source" TEXT /* Source of funding for the experiment */,
  "budget" REAL /* Budget allocated for the experiment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_research_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("research_team_id") REFERENCES research_teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "research_teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each research team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the research team */,
  "team_leader_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team leader */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution where the team is based */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the team */,
  "funding" REAL /* Total funding allocated to the team */,
  "established_date" TEXT /* Date the team was established */,
  "team_size" INTEGER /* Number of members in the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_members" (
  "member_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team member */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the member belongs to */,
  "member_name" TEXT /* Full name of the team member */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the team member */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the team member */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date the member joined the team */,
  "date_left" TEXT /* Date the member left the team (if applicable) */,
  "specialization" TEXT /* Area of specialization of the team member */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("member_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experimental_conditions" (
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each set of experimental conditions */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment the conditions apply to */,
  "temperature" REAL /* Temperature in degrees Celsius */,
  "pH" REAL /* pH level */,
  "nutrient_medium" TEXT /* Type of nutrient medium used */,
  "atmosphere" TEXT /* Atmosphere composition (e.g., aerobic, anaerobic) */,
  "light_intensity" REAL /* Light intensity in the experiment environment */,
  "humidity" REAL /* Humidity level in the experiment environment */,
  "pressure" REAL /* Atmospheric pressure in the experiment environment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("condition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experimental_conditions_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bacterial_strains" (
  "strain_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each bacterial strain */,
  "strain_name" TEXT /* Name of the bacterial strain */,
  "genetic_modification" TEXT /* Genetic modifications made to the strain */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the strain (e.g., lab, culture collection) */,
  "genetic_sequence" TEXT /* Genomic sequence of the strain */,
  "isolation_date" TEXT /* Date the strain was isolated */,
  "storage_conditions" TEXT /* Conditions under which the strain is stored (e.g., -80°C freezer) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("strain_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiment_strains" (
  "mapping_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each strain-experiment mapping */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment */,
  "strain_id" INTEGER /* ID of the bacterial strain */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the strain in the experiment (e.g., donor, recipient) */,
  "initial_population" INTEGER /* Initial population count of the strain in the experiment */,
  "final_population" INTEGER /* Final population count of the strain in the experiment */,
  "growth_rate" REAL /* Growth rate of the strain during the experiment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mapping_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_strains_strain_id FOREIGN KEY ("strain_id") REFERENCES bacterial_strains ("strain_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_strains_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experimental_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each result entry */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment */,
  "grid_reach_95pct" INTEGER /* Number of times the grid reaches 95% */,
  "recipients" INTEGER /* Number of recipient bacteria */,
  "donors" INTEGER /* Number of donor bacteria */,
  "transconjugants" INTEGER /* Number of transconjugants */,
  "segregants" INTEGER /* Number of segregants */,
  "control_group_results" TEXT /* Results from the control group (if applicable) */,
  "experimental_group_results" TEXT /* Results from the experimental group */,
  "p_value" REAL /* P-value for statistical significance of the results */,
  "confidence_interval" TEXT /* Confidence interval for the results */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experimental_results_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "external_data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each external data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "source_type" TEXT /* Type of the data source (e.g., genomic sequences, environmental conditions) */,
  "data_path" TEXT /* Path to the data file */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the data was last updated */,
  "data_format" TEXT /* Format of the data (e.g., FASTA, CSV) */,
  "data_size" REAL /* Size of the data file in MB */,
  "data_license" TEXT /* License under which the data is distributed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiment_data" (
  "data_mapping_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data-source experiment mapping */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the external data source */,
  "data_usage" TEXT /* How the external data was used in the experiment */,
  "data_version" TEXT /* Version of the external data used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_mapping_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_data_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES external_data_sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_data_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "affiliation" TEXT /* Affiliation of the user (e.g., university, company) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the experiment */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the experiment was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "access_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access in minutes */,
  "access_location" TEXT /* Location from where the access was made (e.g., IP address) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiment_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date the version was created */,
  "changes" TEXT /* Description of changes made in this version */,
  "version_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes for the version */,
  "version_status" TEXT /* Status of the version (e.g., draft, approved) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_versions_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_visualizations" (
  "viz_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each visualization */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment */,
  "viz_type" TEXT /* Type of visualization (e.g., scatter plot, bar chart) */,
  "viz_data" TEXT /* Data used for the visualization (e.g., JSON, CSV) */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the visualization was created */,
  "visualization_title" TEXT /* Title of the visualization */,
  "visualization_description" TEXT /* Description of the visualization */,
  "visualization_parameters" TEXT /* Parameters used to generate the visualization */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("viz_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_visualizations_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)
